title: Resurrection
synopsis: Police detective Ichijo investigates ancient ruins where a mysterious belt awakens; Yusuke Godai dons it and transforms to fight the first Gurongi.

title: Transformation
synopsis: Godai learns to control Kuuga's powers as the Gurongi's deadly "game" of killing begins across the city.

title: Trade-off
synopsis: Kuuga discovers that changing forms costs him, while Ichijo races to predict the next Gurongi attack.
